MINI MINUTES: Michael A. Horowitz, Esq., appearing for Defendant. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The Arbitrator's jurisdiction is extended to 6/23/2006. The OSC is re-set to 7/20/2006 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Floyd Butler, CSR#2518. (212)

Ntc Of Motion To Compel Attendance At Independent Medical Examination & For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-13-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Michael A. Horowitz for defendant and moving party
NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel attendance at an independent medical examination is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to contact counsel for defendant immediately to reschedule the examination. The examination is to be completed by January 20, 2006. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $660.30 are to be paid on or before January 20, 2006. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
